name: nordschleife-racer
description: Browser arcade-sim racing engine (TypeScript + Three.js): custom vehicle physics, procedural Nordschleife track, real-time Supabase multiplayer, ghost replays, and a global leaderboard. Engine source behind yassin.app.
author: Yassin Soliman (https://yassin.app)
//: Source + showcase repo — see README 'About this repository'. Runtime engine deps and the author's own tooling scripts are listed below; the playable build (with the host site, car meshes, and Supabase backend) lives at yassin.app.
